gold_report_points: 反引号标识符改为双引号

source_sql: CREATE TABLE u(id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, status ENUM('on','off'))
gold_target_sql: CREATE TYPE u_status AS ENUM('on','off'); CREATE TABLE u(id BIGSERIAL PRIMARY KEY, status u_status)
gold_report_points: ENUM 列需先建 enum 类型

source_sql: INSERT INTO stat(d,c) VALUES('2026-01-01',1) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE c=c+VALUES(c)
gold_target_sql: INSERT INTO stat(d,c) VALUES('2026-01-01',1) ON CONFLICT (d) DO UPDATE SET c=stat.c+EXCLUDED.c
gold_report_points: ON DUPLICATE KEY → ON CONFLICT DO UPDATE

source_sql: SELECT id FROM t WHERE name REGEXP '^a'
gold_target_sql: SELECT id FROM t WHERE name ~ '^a'
